description: Ville côtière entre océan et montagnes. Communauté musulmane diverse et nombreuses adresses halal.

description_en: Vancouver may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 75 halal restaurants and 4 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Vancouver, Canada, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Vancouver: 75+ halal restaurants, 4 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.7/5.
